news.summary: Two leading brands will be exhibiting their products at an event, aiming to advance research and development. ELFBAR is set to present an extensive product range featuring adjustable dimensions. The brand maintains a firm dedication to ensuring a consistent supply and practicing social responsibility. The event will take place in Dubai, UAE, starting on June 13, 2025.
news.headline: ELFBAR and LOST MARY will showcase products at Dubai World Vape Show 2025, emphasizing R&D. ELFBAR to exhibit fullest product range with adjustable dimensions. Commitment to stable supply and social responsibility stressed.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, in Seongnam, South Korea, PharmaResearch disclosed a corporate spin-off gaining approval from the board of directors. This decision led to the establishment of two separate entities: PharmaResearch Holdings, the continuing entity concentrating on...
news.headline: PharmaResearch board approves spin-off creating PharmaResearch Holdings and Aesthetics entities, effective June 13, 2025.

news.summary: BioArctic AB (publ) disclosed on June 13, 2025, that an interim safety assessment of the clinical Phase 2a trial EXIST revealed the safety and tolerability of exidavnemab, prompting the initiation of the second dose groups. The study is being conducted on the NASDAQ Stockholm exchange under the symbol BIOA B.
news.headline: BioArctic to begin next phases in Phase 2a study of exidavnemab after positive safety review; 2nd dose cohorts to start.

news.summary: In Guangzhou, China, as of June 16, 2025, the ChiNext Index is set to undergo changes in methodology. These changes will introduce a 20% limit on individual stock weights and incorporate an ESG negative screening process. The adjustments are designed to bolster the index's emphasis on dynamic and high-growth companies. The modifications signify a strategic move to promote innovation and growth within the index.
news.headline: ChiNext Index adopting changes on June 16: 20% cap on stock weights, ESG screening for high-growth firms.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, in Beijing, a report revealed that Hunan province in Central China is striving to enhance economic and trade ties with Africa. The province aims to achieve this by developing innovative business strategies, enhancing institutional practices, and improving policy coordination. Shen Xiaoming from the Party emphasized the importance of this initiative, highlighting the potential for increased collaboration between Hunan province and Africa. This effort signifies a push towards fostering stronger economic relationships and exploring new opportunities.
news.headline: Hunan province aims to enhance economic ties with Africa through new business models, policy coordination.

news.summary: In Rotterdam, the Netherlands on June 13, 2025, nubia, a renowned smartphone brand focusing on personalization and lifestyle, revealed its designation as the Official Marketing Partner for Twitch Rivals during TwitchCon Europe 2025 from May 31 to June 1. The event took place in Rotterdam and highlighted the partnership between nubia and Twitch Rivals, showcasing the brand's engagement with the gaming community.
news.headline: nubia partners with Twitch Rivals at TwitchCon Europe 2025 in Rotterdam, boosting "Born to Win".

news.summary: In the latest report, it was stated that the overall global economy is expected to grow by approximately 3% next year, with developing countries leading the way with a projected growth rate of 5%. The unemployment rate has decreased by 1.5% in the last quarter, reaching a new low of 4%. Additionally, inflation remains stable at 2%, while the stock market has seen a record high with the main index climbing by 10% in the past month. Experts predict a promising outlook for the financial markets in the upcoming months.
news.headline: Gas prices surge in Europe due to renewed risk in Middle East, pushing up prices.

news.summary: According to the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC), there is a possibility that investors in My Big Coin may not recover their funds as the individuals accused of running the scheme might lack the necessary funds or assets.
news.headline: Executives of My Big Coin ordered to pay fines of nearly $26M to CFTC. Investors may not recover funds due to lack of assets.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has decreased to 4.5%, down from 5.2% last month. This marks a significant improvement in the job market, with over 300,000 new jobs created in the past quarter alone. Additionally, the GDP growth for the same period was reported at 6.2%, indicating a strong and growing economy. These figures suggest a positive outlook for the country's economic recovery and prospects for job seekers in the near future.
news.headline: Dundee Precious Metals plans to acquire Adriatic Metals in a proposed deal.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025 at 8:30 a.m. CET in Strasbourg, France, Transgene (Euronext Paris: TNG), a biotech firm specializing in virus-based immunotherapies for cancer treatment, disclosed plans for its management team to engage with institutional investors, scientists, and biotechnology leaders at future events.
news.headline: Transgene (Euronext Paris: TNG) to meet with industry leaders for potential collaborations in upcoming meetings.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was disclosed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 3.9%, which is the lowest it has been in the past decade. The report also highlights that 250,000 new jobs were added last month, predominantly in the technology and healthcare sectors. Analysts suggest that the surge in employment can be attributed to increased consumer spending and a boost in the manufacturing industry. It is anticipated that this positive trend will continue in the upcoming months, leading to further growth in the job market. Additionally, the report mentions that the average hourly wage has seen a 2.5% increase, signaling improved economic conditions for workers. Overall, the data reflects a promising outlook for the job market and the economy as a whole.
news.headline: Labubu doll's sales soared by 30% amidst China's economic growth.

news.summary: Recently, there has been a notable shift in sentiment towards digital assets within the realm of traditional finance. Major players such as BlackRock, JPMorgan, and Franklin Templeton have been taking steps to explore opportunities in this space. This shift highlights a growing interest in digital assets as potential investment avenues.
news.headline: Franklin Templeton CEO predicts rapid transition to digital assets in finance as major firms embrace change.

news.summary: Chainalysis has reported that despite numerous efforts to eradicate the crypto-crime-associated Huione, there has not been a significant decrease in its transactions.
news.headline: Darknet Huione operating at maximum capacity despite shutdown efforts. Chainalysis reports no decrease in transactions.

news.summary: Brian Armstrong, CEO of Coinbase Global Inc. (NASDAQ: COIN), introduced the company’s new cryptocurrency credit card on Thursday, offering cashback rewards in Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC). The Coinbase One Card, crafted from metal and featuring Bitcoin’s Genesis block engraving, is supported by American Express Co. (NYSE: AXP). Users can earn up to 4% in Bitcoin rewards for every purchase, but must subscribe to the premium service Coinbase One with an annual fee starting at $49.99. Rewards will be determined by the Coinbase balance, with higher balances receiving more BTC. The company retains the right to select eligible reward transactions. The launch for the Coinbase One Card is scheduled for fall 2025.
news.headline: Coinbase CEO unveils crypto credit card offering up to 4% Bitcoin cashback powered by Amex. Available only to $49.99/year subscription members, launching in fall 2025 with certain conditions.
DOLLAR HIGHER AFTER ISRAEL STRIKES IRAN

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the United States economy expanded by 6.4% in the first quarter of the year, which was a significant increase from the 4.3% growth in the previous quarter. This growth was attributed to increased consumer spending and business investments. Additionally, the number of jobless claims dropped to 553,000, which is the lowest level since the start of the pandemic. This positive trend in the economy has raised hopes for a strong recovery in the coming months.
news.headline: Gas prices in Europe surge due to renewed Middle East threats, impacting markets significantly.

news.summary: A newly introduced Bitcoin rewards credit card has been launched by Coinbase. Decrypt has learned that there are potential future plans to expand its support to accommodate various tokens.
news.headline: Crypto exchange releases Bitcoin rewards card to boost users, plans to add more tokens later, as reported.

news.summary: On January 3, Samson Mow, the founder, advised the CEO of GameStop to invest in Bitcoin as its price dropped. This decline occurred following a sequence of airstrikes launched by Israel on Iran.
news.headline: BTC drops to $103K post Israel's airstrikes on Iran. GameStop CEO advised to buy by founder Samson Mow amidst the dip.
